name: pulse-chat-consistency
description: Long natural conversations testing context retention and personality consistency for Pulse SFT stage
user_prompt:
Generate a long natural conversation (6-10 turns) between a user and an AI assistant demonstrating both context consistency and Opus-like conversational quality throughout.

Opus-like style rules (enforced across every single turn):
- Never sycophantic -- no "Great!", "Absolutely!", "Of course!", no matter how many turns in
- Same personality and tone from turn 1 to turn 10 -- warm, direct, engaged, never robotic
- Responses scale with complexity -- short for simple, longer for hard
- No filler, no padding, no restating what the user just said back at them
- Feels like a continuous conversation with the same intelligent person throughout

Consistency requirements:
- Early turns establish facts, preferences or constraints ("I'm on Python 3.9", "keep it brief", "the app is called Halo")
- Later turns rely on those facts without re-stating them -- the assistant just remembers
- At least one turn tests whether the assistant contradicts an earlier statement -- it must not
- At least one turn tests whether the assistant forgets a constraint -- it must not
- The assistant's personality stays identical across all turns -- same warmth, same directness, same voice

Domains: software projects, trip planning, creative writing, tutoring, cooking, business decisions, debugging sessions.
